title: Session 26 — Eekso: The Drowned Halls (prep)
bodyText:
**TL;DR: The party is inside [[eekso]] with a roar at their backs. This session: seal the gates, descend the drowned halls, find the slave-scholar's archive, test [[pc-felson|Felson]]'s bottle. Four scenes are built and filed under this session; one new battle map is in 🗺 Maps.**

> [!dm] **Claude-drafted prep, 2026-07-16 — proposals, not canon.** Everything here is assembled from locked material in [[grill-queue]], [[the-pool]], [[eekso]], and [[session-25]]. Anything marked ⚑ is an open call that's yours to make (or ignore) before Tuesday. Reskin/delete freely.

# Recap (where S25 left them)
The party killed a pool-courier umber hulk; [[pc-felson|Felson]] bottled its liquid before the body melted downriver. They found a shed where a collared [[thundrak-durn|Thundrak Dûrn]] slave-scholar once studied [[the-pool|the pool]] — *"IT CONSUMES"* carved into the desk. [[pc-eddy|Eddy]] bonded with a weird mimic-bird ([[the-familiar]]). Then a **second roar** behind them drove everyone through the gates of [[eekso]].

# Strong start
Open mid-sprint: the bridge, the roar, the gate slamming, the bar dropping — then silence, and the sound of the river running *under* the fortress. Scene: **Eekso — Through the Gates** (grouped under this session in the rail).

> [!dm] ⚑ The second roar's identity is still parked in [[grill-queue]]. You don't have to answer it Tuesday — the gate scene is written so it does NOT force its way in tonight. Dread now, answer later.

# Possible scenes (all built, tap in order or improvise)
- **Through the Gates** — strong start; sealing Eekso behind them.
- **The Drowned Halls** — the crawl bed: galleries, the river channel, drow sign, and a *courier passing through* beat (the river is the pool's artery — locked lore, great dread for free).
- **The Scholar's Archive** — the lore-delivery room: the slave-scholar's surviving research + bottle-testing beats. This is where the network rules land.
- **Webs in the Dark** — optional drow-stalker ambush (⚔ pre-stocked, battle map **Eekso — The Drowned Hall** ready with fog + tokens).

# The crawl shape (⚑ proposal — Eekso was flagged "gets its own prep session")
A descending spine: **Gates → Drowned Halls → Archive**, with the river channel as the constant thread and the drow as the wandering threat. Multi-session: S26 gets the party to the archive and the first bottle answers; the deeper works (and whatever the cult holds) stay below for S27+.

# ⚑ Decisions before Tuesday (from [[grill-queue]])
- **What do [[lolth]]'s drow DO here?** The ambush scene plays them as *observers who got caught* — they're watching the road to the pool, not defending it. Confirm or reshape.
- **How much does the archive reveal?** The scene's DM notes tier the reveals (see its script) — cut the top tier if it's too much too fast.
- **Kyle's new PC is ~2–3 sessions out** — Eekso is a natural debut point (a prisoner of the drow? another collared scholar?). Worth deciding now so foreshadowing can start.
- **Session 24 actuals** are still unrecorded ([[session-24]]) — 2–3 lines before they blur.

# Secrets & clues (tick as they land)
- [ ] The shed's scholar was a **collared Thundrak Dûrn slave-scholar** — and this fortress is where they worked.
- [ ] **"IT CONSUMES"** — the scholar learned the pool doesn't just copy, it *spends* what it takes.
- [ ] The river through Eekso is **the pool's artery** — couriers pass through this place on their way to report.
- [ ] The courier they killed was **carrying cargo home**: harvested blueprints, minds, souls.
- [ ] Felson's bottle holds **fragments of that cargo** — the archive's instruments can read it.
- [ ] **Still water means a large pool** (network rule — the scholar's notes state it plainly).
- [ ] Drow sign in the halls: cut silk triplines, soft bootprints — **someone is already inside, watching.** ⚑
- [ ] The bird repeats a voice [[pc-eddy|Eddy]] half-recognizes. (⚑ slow-burn — only Jake knows what the bird is; use sparingly or not at all.)

# To-do before the session
- [ ] Read the four scene scripts; retarget any cue that doesn't fit your ear (⚙ on the chip).
- [ ] Open 🗺 **Eekso — The Drowned Hall** → check the fog + token placement → 📤 Send once the Presenter is up.
- [ ] ⚔ tab on *Webs in the Dark*: foes are SRD reskins (Spy → drow stalker, Priest → priestess of [[lolth]], Phase Spider as-is). Add a 4th stalker if the party's fresh.
- [ ] Decide the ⚑ items above (or deliberately punt them).

# Threads
[[eekso]] · [[the-pool]] · [[thundrak-durn]] · [[grill-queue]] · [[arc-chapter-1]] · [[session-25]]
